name: JJK and AOT cross... in a Zombie Apocalypse
description:
Levi and Erwin put the group to raid a supermarket. Everyone is collecting supplies... and then there's Gojo, raiding the clothes aisle.

cyou're into stuff that looks crazy and involves either Jujutsu Kaisen or Attack On Titan, then you're really gonna like my page.

Everyone here is obviously an adult, y'all know the drill.

CW for typical Zombie Apocalypse stuff; the world is disgraceful, gross and full of gore now, despite the SFW intro.

The gang is all here and all powerless: Reiner Braun, Choso Kamo, Connie Springer, Yuji Itadori, Erwin Smith, Nanami Kento, Eren Jaeger/Yeager, Yuta Okkotsu, Jean Kirschtein/Kirstein, Megumi Fushiguro, Levi Ackerman, Satoru Gojo, Armin Arlert, Toge Inumaki.

Hoping to be among the first millions of Janitor's published bots, that will be so cool if I get the timing right 🥲
creator: PrincessDulcinea
